summary.en: Networked EV chargers in Maldives projects may be required by the charge-point operator, utility, resort operator, public-sector tender, or donor-funded project to support OCPP back-office communication, remote monitoring, access control, energy reporting, and load management. EMC evidence should address IEC 61000-family emissions and immunity, especially where chargers are installed on compact island grids with solar inverters, battery storage, telecom equipment, and sensitive resort or airport loads. OCPP and EMC obligations are typically project-specified rather than a confirmed single national EVSE rule.
summary.zh: 马尔代夫项目中的联网电动汽车充电桩可能被充电点运营商、公用事业单位、度假村运营方、公共部门招标或捐助方资助项目要求支持OCPP后台通信、远程监控、访问控制、用电报告和负荷管理。EMC证据应覆盖IEC 61000系列发射和抗扰度，尤其是在紧凑岛屿电网中与光伏逆变器、电池储能、电信设备及敏感度假村或机场负载共同安装时。OCPP和EMC义务通常由项目指定，而非已确认的单一国家EVSE规则。
summary.zht: 馬爾地夫項目中的聯網電動汽車充電樁可能被充電點運營商、公用事業單位、度假村運營方、公共部門招標或捐助方資助項目要求支持OCPP後台通訊、遠程監控、訪問控制、用電報告和負荷管理。EMC證據應覆蓋IEC 61000系列發射和抗擾度，尤其是在緊湊島嶼電網中與光伏逆變器、電池儲能、電信設備及敏感度假村或機場負載共同安裝時。OCPP和EMC義務通常由項目指定，而非已確認的單一國家EVSE規則。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) — back-office communication for networked chargers
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-21-2 — EMC requirements for off-board electric vehicle charging systems
Utility or charge-point-operator smart-charger integration requirements

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 communication between the off-board charger and vehicle BMS. This CAN-based vehicle communication is not an OCPP back-office protocol and is not a substitute for CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication where CCS2 is used. China-market chargers may include proprietary cloud platforms or operator-specific protocols, but these integrations must be revalidated against the Maldives operator or project back office.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023作为非车载充电机与车辆BMS之间的通信。该CAN总线车辆通信不是OCPP后台协议，也不能替代采用CCS2时所需的CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信。中国市场充电桩可能包含私有云平台或运营商特定协议，但这些集成须针对马尔代夫运营商或项目后台重新验证。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023作為非車載充電機與車輛BMS之間的通訊。該CAN總線車輛通訊不是OCPP後台協議，也不能替代採用CCS2時所需的CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊。中國市場充電樁可能包含私有雲平台或運營商特定協議，但這些集成須針對馬爾地夫運營商或項目後台重新驗證。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
China EMC test reports for domestic configuration where available

gap.en: Exporters should confirm the required OCPP version, backend endpoint, SIM or Ethernet requirements, cybersecurity controls, remote metering functions, load-management interface, and site acceptance testing. EMC reports must cover the final Maldives hardware configuration, including connector family, cable length, enclosure, cellular router, payment terminal, and power module. A charger with only GB/T 27930 DC communication and no project-approved OCPP integration is not ready for networked Maldives deployment.
gap.zh: 出口商应确认所需OCPP版本、后台端点、SIM或以太网要求、网络安全控制、远程计量功能、负荷管理接口和现场验收测试。EMC报告必须覆盖马尔代夫最终硬件配置，包括接口体系、电缆长度、外壳、蜂窝路由器、支付终端和电源模块。仅具备GB/T 27930直流通信且无项目认可OCPP集成的充电桩，不适合马尔代夫联网部署。
gap.zht: 出口商應確認所需OCPP版本、後台端點、SIM或以太網要求、網絡安全控制、遠程計量功能、負荷管理接口和現場驗收測試。EMC報告必須覆蓋馬爾地夫最終硬體配置，包括接口體系、電纜長度、外殼、蜂窩路由器、支付終端和電源模組。僅具備GB/T 27930直流通訊且無項目認可OCPP集成的充電樁，不適合馬爾地夫聯網部署。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — OCPP and backend integration are mandatory when required by the operator, tender, utility, resort owner, or donor-funded project; EMC evidence is expected for IEC-aligned charger acceptance and island-grid power-quality review
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication but is not OCPP-compatible and does not substitute for Maldives project back-office integration

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For networked Maldives sites, OCPP and EMC evidence should be tied to the final hardware and backend configuration. GB/T 27930 vehicle communication does not satisfy OCPP back-office integration or CCS2 communication requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于马尔代夫联网站点，OCPP和EMC证据应绑定最终硬件及后台配置。GB/T 27930车辆通信不能满足OCPP后台集成或CCS2通信要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於馬爾地夫聯網站點，OCPP和EMC證據應綁定最終硬體及後台配置。GB/T 27930車輛通訊不能滿足OCPP後台集成或CCS2通訊要求。
